response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and customer-facing technical leadership in cloud-based AI delivery — key requirements for the staff-level role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and distributed systems
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required skills
Resume lacks demonstrable enterprise customer-facing AI deployment experience
Primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js; minimal evidence of Python in production AI systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of GenAI production track record
